title: fix(deps): update dependency preact-compat to v3.18.0 - autoclosed
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [preact-compat](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat) from `v3.17.0` to `v3.18.0`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v3.18.0`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/releases/3.18.0)

- Implement `react-dom-factories` (#​456, thanks @​freeman)
- Call `getDefaultProps` on the class so static properties are available (#​421, @​joeyrobert)
- Fix cloned `props.children` issue (#​415, thanks @​kozak)
- Fix IE11 lacking `Symbol.for()` (#​423, @​xxxiin)

---

</details>


<details>
<summary>Commits</summary>

#### v3.18.0
-   [`1a88d10`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/1a88d10af747e5f67620e4bd9412b577579c96ee) IE11 seems to define Symbol but without the method 'for' (#​423)
-   [`605b943`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/605b943e74b490a0fff11defd20ee3b29be8ca26) fix multi cloned element lose props.children bug (#​415)
-   [`469e791`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/469e79186f97cf3c85d9d44369334ffa6b3333d3) update readme (#​413)
-   [`5ca5748`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/5ca57489b75c539a0ad022f3624d97d755c939b5) Document usage with Brunch (#​386)
-   [`1f0e508`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/1f0e5080b00b3c7c38ea2d0dd03fc0dec00c073f) Call getDefaultProps on the class so statics can be read (#​421)
-   [`c6d5659`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/c6d5659f7bcba06b3eb4e486898581d33d576f1e) implement react-dom-factories (#​456)
-   [`2f77d0a`](https://github.com/developit/preact-compat/commit/2f77d0ad8dd038b4515a2c42343d4b727ddd8c6c) 3.18.0

</details>
